CurrentIssues.ID: ComplexCondition:ModelDownloader.kt$ModelDownloader$responseCode == HttpURLConnection.HTTP_MOVED_TEMP || responseCode == HttpURLConnection.HTTP_MOVED_PERM || responseCode == HttpURLConnection.HTTP_SEE_OTHER || responseCode == HTTP_TEMPORARY_REDIRECT || responseCode == HTTP_PERMANENT_REDIRECT

CyclomaticComplexMethod:ChatScreen.kt$@OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class) @Composable private fun ChatContent( state: ChatState, snackbarHostState: SnackbarHostState, onAction: (ChatAction) -> Unit )
CyclomaticComplexMethod:ModelDownloader.kt$ModelDownloader$suspend fun download( variant: ModelVariant = ModelVariant.autoSelect(), onProgress: (Float) -> Unit ): Result<DownloadResult>
LongMethod:ChatScreen.kt$@OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class) @Composable private fun ChatContent( state: ChatState, snackbarHostState: SnackbarHostState, onAction: (ChatAction) -> Unit )
LongMethod:ModelDownloader.kt$ModelDownloader$suspend fun download( variant: ModelVariant = ModelVariant.autoSelect(), onProgress: (Float) -> Unit ): Result<DownloadResult>
MaxLineLength:ChatViewModel.kt$ChatViewModel$error = "Ошибка загрузки: ${error.message}. Проверь подключение к интернету и попробуй снова."

MaxLineLength:ChatViewModel.kt$ChatViewModel$text = "Привет! Я Арчи 🤖
Я работаю прямо на твоём телефоне — без интернета!

Для начала нужно загрузить AI-модель."

MaxLineLength:ChatViewModel.kt$ChatViewModel.Companion$private const val SYSTEM_PROMPT = "You are Archie, a cheerful AI companion for learning English. Speak in a friendly, slightly ironic tone. Keep answers very short (2-4 sentences). If the user writes in English, gently correct mistakes. If in Russian, translate to English and explain briefly."
MaxLineLength:GpuCapabilityChecker.kt$GpuCapabilityChecker$Log.d(TAG, if (found) "libOpenCL.so found — GPU likely supported" else "libOpenCL.so not found — GPU not supported")
MaxLineLength:LocalAiRepository.kt$LocalAiRepository$Exception("Model file appears incomplete (${file.length()} bytes, expected >$minExpectedSize). Please re-download.")
MaxLineLength:ModelDownloader.kt$ModelDownloader$Log.d(TAG, "[${variant.displayName}] Resuming download from byte $startByte, temp exists: ${tempFile.exists()}")
ReturnCount:ChatContextManager.kt$ChatContextManager$private fun trimByChars(prompt: String, systemPrompt: String, newUserMessage: String): String

UseIfInsteadOfWhen:ChatViewModel.kt$ChatViewModel$when { errorMsg.contains("file not found", ignoreCase = true) -> { "Файл модели не найден. Нажмите «Загрузить», чтобы скачать модель." } else -> { "Не удалось запустить модель: $errorMsg. " + "Файл модели был удалён, попробуйте загрузить заново." } }
